postmark.Subject: Refinance — Patricia Simmons (92% LTV — exception request)
postmark.TextBody:
Hi Franco,

Patricia Simmons refi at 92% LTV — borrower needs to pull equity for medical expenses; lender willing if we can structure exception. $846k against $920k. Strong income + perfect payment history.

Know this is above standard band — let me know if we can run as exception or if we should restructure.

Jonathan Ferrara
Ferrara Financial
Lic. #M16002271
